name: My Avatar
author: your-name
description: One-line description shown in the preset picker / on the store page.

avatar.//: Self-contained: put your segments + manifest + source under avatar/. Paths are URLs the player loads (served from the preset dir).

font.//: Bundle ONLY fonts whose license permits redistribution + commercial use (e.g. SIL OFL / Google Fonts). Put the file under fonts/.

theme.//: Either a built-in theme id (graphite/crimson/ember/gold/teal/rose/azure/paper/rose_l/sky_l/sand_l) OR an inline theme object.
